title: Taxonomy of AI Risks in Public Policy
description: A flowchart categorizing the primary risks associated with AI deployment, moving from their technical origins to their societal and ethical impacts.
elements: Governance Risks (e.g., Accountability Gaps, Regulatory Challenges)
Existential & Systemic Risks (e.g., Loss of Control, Value Misalignment)
relationships: Technical Risks can escalate into Societal Risks
Unmitigated risks at all levels contribute to potential Existential & Systemic Risks
